nasb.text: But when Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon came up against the land, we said, ‘Come and let us go to Jerusalem before the army of the Chaldeans and before the army of the Arameans.’ So we have dwelt in Jerusalem.”

esv.text: But when Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon came up against the land, we said, ‘Come, and let us go to Jerusalem for fear of the army of the Chaldeans and the army of the Syrians.’ So we are living in Jerusalem.”

cnv.text: 但是，巴比倫王尼布甲尼撒上來攻打這地的時候，我們就說：‘來吧！為了迦勒底和亞蘭人的軍隊的緣故，我們到耶路撒冷去。’這樣，我們才住在耶路撒冷。”

ccb.text: 但当巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒进攻这里的时候，我们决定来耶路撒冷躲避迦勒底和亚兰的军队。因此，我们现在住在耶路撒冷。”
